examples: After all, any scheme that so many politicians agree on is almost bound to be a clunker itself.

Hyundai's messages of the early clunker rebates, along with Assurance and the Gas Lock programs, gave the marketer "a better and richer story to tell, " he said.
With miserable enough results a boss can be rated a clunker even with a tiny paycheck.
